objective: Integrate recency decay, metrics integrity validation, and externalized configuration into an existing scoring system without modifying compute_policy_score signature, policy_engine behavior, or execution flow.
decisions: Do not redesign scoring system; only additive integration allowed
Preserve compute_policy_score(policy, metrics) as system entrypoint
Inject new scoring logic inside compute_policy_score as a wrapper
Introduce compute_score as internal scoring engine
Apply recency decay after weighted score computation
Externalize weights, bounds, and decay parameters into scoring_config.py
Use safe fallback (return 0.0) on any scoring failure
Extract last_used_timestamp from policy first, then metrics, else fallback
Ensure deterministic behavior (no randomness, controlled time dependency)
Do not modify policy_engine or execution flow
Clamp invalid metric values within predefined bounds
Treat latency as inverse metric during normalization
Use exponential decay for recency factor with lower bound cap
Ensure backward compatibility under all conditions

built_components.name: compute_policy_score
built_components.description: Primary scoring entrypoint extended to include validation, recency handling, and new scoring logic

built_components.name: compute_score
built_components.description: Calculates weighted normalized score and applies recency decay

built_components.name: validate_metrics
built_components.description: Validates and clamps metric values based on config bounds

built_components.name: compute_recency_factor
built_components.description: Computes exponential decay factor using last_used_timestamp

built_components.name: normalize
built_components.description: Normalizes metric values within defined bounds

built_components.name: SCORING_CONFIG
built_components.description: External configuration for weights, bounds, and recency decay parameters

inputs: metrics dictionary (may contain success_rate, latency, resource_efficiency, confidence, last_used_timestamp)
notes: Code for scoring.py and scoring_config.py has been fully defined and aligned with constraints, but deployment, system restart, timestamp source verification, and runtime validation are not confirmed as executed.
